sections.paragraph:
Original: יאר

Transliteration: ye'ôr

Phonetic: yeh-ore'

BDB Definition:

  1. river, stream, canal, Nile, Nile-canal
    1. stream, river (Nile)
    2. Nile-arms, Nile-canals
    3. watercourses
    4. shafts (mining)
    5. river (in general)

Origin: of Egyptian origin

TWOT entry: 832

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
